sentences.arabic: الْعُرْسُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مُنَاسَبَةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ تَجْتَمِعُ فِيهَا الْعَائِلَةُ وَالْأَصْدِقَاءُ.
sentences.translation: Arapsko vjenčanje je velika svečanost na kojoj se okupljaju porodica i prijatelji.
sentences.translationEn: An Arab wedding is a grand occasion where family and friends gather together.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الْعَرِيسُ ثِيَابًا أَنِيقَةً وَتَرْتَدِي الْعَرُوسُ فُسْتَانًا جَمِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Mladoženja nosi elegantnu odjeću, a mladenka lijepu haljinu.
sentences.translationEn: The groom wears elegant clothes and the bride wears a beautiful dress.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ النَّاسُ الْهَدَايَا لِلزَّوْجَيْنِ وَيَأْكُلُونَ الطَّعَامَ الشَّهِيَّ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Gosti donose poklone mladencima i zajedno uživaju u ukusnoj hrani.
sentences.translationEn: People bring gifts for the couple and enjoy delicious food together.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَدُّ الْأَفْرَاحُ أَحْيَانًا لِأَكْثَرَ مِنْ يَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ وَتَمْلَأُهَا الْمُوسِيقَى وَالرَّقْصُ.
sentences.translation: Slavlje ponekad traje više od jednog dana i ispunjeno je muzikom i plesom.
sentences.translationEn: The celebrations sometimes last more than one day, filled with music and dancing.
